policies.name: Production Change Window
policies.description: Production changes must occur between 10PM and 6AM UTC
policies.remediation: Schedule this runbook execution within the approved change window (10PM–6AM UTC)

policies.name: VP Approval for DB Operations
policies.description: Any step that modifies a production database requires VP-level approval
policies.remediation: Add a human-in-the-loop approval gate at this step and assign to VP Engineering

policies.name: SSH Command Audit Logging
policies.description: All SSH commands must be logged to the audit trail
policies.remediation: Wrap SSH commands with the auditd logger: audit-exec '<command>'

policies.name: Max Parallel Executions
policies.description: No more than 50 steps may execute in parallel
policies.remediation: Reduce parallel step fan-out to a maximum of 50 concurrent steps

policies.name: Rollback Procedure Required
policies.description: Any runbook with COMMAND steps must include at least one rollback step
policies.remediation: Add a rollback section to the runbook with explicit recovery steps

policies.name: Smoke Test After Deployment
policies.description: Runbooks that restart services must end with an ASSERT smoke test
policies.remediation: Add an ASSERT step at the end of the runbook to verify service health

policies.name: No Plaintext Secrets
policies.description: Runbook steps must not contain plaintext passwords or API keys
policies.remediation: Replace plaintext credentials with parameter placeholders: {secret_name}

policies.name: Kubernetes Namespace Isolation
policies.description: kubectl commands must specify an explicit namespace
policies.remediation: Add -n {namespace} flag to all kubectl commands

policies.name: Force-Delete Forbidden
policies.description: kubectl delete --force and rm -rf are prohibited without approval
policies.remediation: Add an explicit approval gate before any force-delete operation

policies.name: Parameter Documentation
policies.description: All runbook parameters must be documented with descriptions
policies.remediation: Add descriptions to all parameters in the runbook parameter section
